name: Shepherd's Pie II
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Tomatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
1 cup Chicken stock or 2 packages Instant chicken broth and 1 cup Water
1 1/2 pounds Cooked lamb, cut into 1-inch cubes
3 cups Mashed potatoes, leftover, made freshly
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine vegetable oil, onion, and tomatoes. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until tender. Set aside.
2. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
3. Blend flour, salt, pepper, and chicken stock in the melted butter. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until thickened and smooth. Stir occasionally.
4. Add sauce and cooked lamb to onion-tomato mixture. Stir to combine.
5. Cover and heat in Microwave Oven for 5 to 7 minutes or until almost heated through (time will depend on the temperature of the cooked lamb). Top with mashed potatoes and heat, uncovered, an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until serving temperature is reached.
Variation: Cooked beef chunks, ground beef, or ground lamb may be substituted for cooked lamb.
